steps.title: Use the reduced modifier
steps.content: The words between commas describe Pascal before the main verb is. The phrase needs the reduced form of which is used in software development and educational instruction.

steps.title: Reject mismatched forms
steps.content: A suggests purpose, C creates a noun phrase that misidentifies Pascal, and D wrongly makes Pascal the thing doing the using. A past participle gives the needed passive description. The answer is B.
